title: Sheboygan Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Sheboygan with a Z-Score of -3.63. This event has been categorized as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sheboygan are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The HDD value of 13.7 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 64% and wind speed of 4.6 km/h are also being closely monitored.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
